# VGC Coach for OpenCode

<!-- Generated by tools/build_plugins.py -->

Version: `0.1.0`

This package is generated from the canonical shared skill source in `vgc-coach`.
It is intentionally self-contained: the skills, supporting docs, eval artifacts, and exact-calc helper live inside this plugin package so installs do not depend on repo-local symlinks.

## Included Skills

- `vgc-meta-research`: Research the live Champions meta
- `vgc-team-builder`: Build one honest, coherent Champions team
- `vgc-team-audit`: Find structural flaws without flattening identity
- `vgc-lead-planner`: Plan default and matchup-specific leads
- `vgc-battle-review`: Review games for real mistakes and better lines
- `vgc-format-verifier`: Verify format rules and legality assumptions
- `vgc-source-verifier`: Check whether a VGC claim is actually well-sourced
- `vgc-calcs-assistant`: Turn calc questions into actionable prep with honest exactness
- `vgc-opponent-scout`: Scout likely shells, techs, and prep risks
- `vgc-practice-journal`: Capture practice sessions into repeatable next steps

## Runtime Docs

- `docs/runtime/opencode.md`

## Packaging Rules

- Shared coaching logic comes from `skills/`
- Supporting references and examples come from `docs/skills/`
- The exact damage helper lives at `tools/browser_damage_calc.py`
- Generated files should be refreshed with `python3 tools/build_plugins.py`
